calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Melanie Gheno #7489.

Akele Atkins, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises, Inc.
No appearance by defendant AC General Engineering INc., a corporation.
Default was entered against defendant on July 8, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Christopher Donald Barringer was filed on June 14, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Atilano Alcala was filed on September 16, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 16,2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant AC General Engineering Inc, a corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $12,3318.79.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,990.34.
Attorney Fees - $4,475.00.
Costs - $760.56, for a total judgment in the amount of $19,144.69.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
